behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction explicitly names all tested strings (components_to_document = ["dataframe", "js-client"], urlExists, method: "HEAD", prism-svelte, svelte: "svelte", md: "markdown", css: "css", ./dist/Index.svelte, ./dist/Example.svelte) and the file paths.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction dictates exact literal strings like 'components_to_document = ["dataframe", "js-client"]', 'components_to_document.includes(p)', function name 'urlExists', 'method: "HEAD"', and the exact langs map entries, effectively specifying the implementation verbatim.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert exact variable name 'components_to_document', helper function name 'urlExists', and literal string 'method: "HEAD"' — alternative correct implementations using different names would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most tests are substring checks on file contents (e.g., 'components_to_document.includes(p)' in content, 'async function urlExists' in content); the TypeScript 'syntax' tests only do fs.readFileSync without actual parsing.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests check for specific new content (comprehensive README sections, deleted standalone file, package.json default fields) that a stub/no-op would not satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each requirement in instruction.md (README consolidation, layout filter, urlExists redirect, prism-svelte, langs map, package.json exports, nav removal) has a corresponding test.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments: Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass consistency, repo_tests.

structured_data_schema.reason: package.json export schema (default/types fields and their exact path values) is documented in instruction.md.

no_typos.reason: No typos observed in referenced paths or identifiers.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction specifies exact implementation details like 'The exact string being tested is: components_to_document = ["dataframe", "js-client"]' and 'The helper function should be named urlExists', going beyond describing what's broken.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: package.json edits are localized to adding default fields in two export entries; not a full rewrite.
